description: Create a professional one-page visual resume for 'Jordan Smith', a Senior Systems Analyst, using Wondershare EdrawMax. The resume should feature a two-column layout consisting of a Sidebar (approx 1/3 width) and Main Content (approx 2/3 width). The Sidebar must include contact information (jordan.smith@example.com, (555) 012-3456, San Francisco, CA) and skills with visual rating shapes for: 'System Architecture' (90%), 'Python / Pandas' (85%), 'SQL & Database Design' (95%), and 'Docker / Kubernetes' (70%). The Main Content must include the header (Jordan Smith, Senior Systems Analyst), a profile (Results-oriented analyst with 7+ years of experience in optimizing legacy systems and designing scalable cloud architectures.), work experience (TechCorp Solutions (2020-Present): Lead Analyst for cloud migration project reducing infrastructure costs by 30%; DataFlow Inc. (2017-2020): Streamlined database queries improving application response time by 40%), and education (B.S. Computer Science, University of California, Berkeley (2017)). Save the editable file to /home/ga/Documents/jordan_smith_resume.eddx and export the PDF to /home/ga/Documents/jordan_smith_resume.pdf.
